zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Fulleshurst II於1419年10月17日出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Thomas de Fouleshurst II22歲，母親Cecily Mainwaring18歲。他於1439年與Lady Joan De Vernon在英國爾法爾登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年5月24日在英國爾巴堂姆利享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Fulleshurst II于1419年10月17日出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Fouleshurst II22岁，母亲Cecily Mainwaring18岁。他于1439年与Lady Joan De Vernon在英国爾法爾登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1502年5月24日在英国爾巴堂姆利享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Fulleshurst II was born on 17 October 1419, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, was 22 and his mother, Cecily Mainwaring, was 18. He married Lady Joan De Vernon in 1439, in Farndon, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 24 May 1502, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Fulleshurst II est né le 17 octobre 1419, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Cecily Mainwaring, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan De Vernon en 1439, à Farndon, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1502, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Fulleshurst II am 17. Oktober 1419 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Fouleshurst II 22 und seine Mutter Cecily Mainwaring 18. Er hat 1439 in Farndon, Cheshire, England Lady Joan De Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Mai 1502 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

Lui sposato Lady Joan De Vernon nel 1439, nel Farndon, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1502, nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Fulleshurst IIが1419年10月17日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Fouleshurst IIは22歳，母Cecily Mainwaringは18歳であった。1439年にイギリスチェシュアイアファルンドンでLady Joan De Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年5月24日にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Fulleshurst II(이)가 1419년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Fouleshurst II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Mainwaring(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 체실르 패른던에서 Lady Joan De Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 5월 24일 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Fulleshurst II родился 17 октября 1419 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Fouleshurst II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Mainwaring, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan De Vernon в 1439 г. в местности фарндон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 24 мая 1502 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.
